

## paymentmiddleware


```bash
{service="prod-payment-middleware"}
|json
|= `TG240510P00022`
|json
| line_format "{{._msg}}"
```



## task data


{"RefundRequestIds":[129378],"TradesOrderGroupId":1615398,"PayType":"TwoCTwoP"}  


## refundrequest


use ERPDB


```sql
select RefundRequest_TradesOrderGroupCode,RefundRequest_CreatedDateTime,RefundRequest_UpdatedDateTime,RefundRequest_ResponseMsg,*
from RefundRequest(nolock)
where RefundRequest_ValidFlag = 1
and RefundRequest_Id IN (122952,129378)


select OrderSlaveFlow_TradesOrderGroupCode,OrderSlaveFlow_SalesOrderSlaveShopId,*
from OrderSlaveFlow(nolock)
where OrderSlaveFlow_TradesOrderGroupId IN (1504918,1615398)
```


## 129378

TG240510P00022


RefundRequest_CreatedDateTime
2024-05-10 13:44:27.837
RefundRequest_UpdatedDateTime
2026-04-15 18:02:08.963


shopid = 69
0.01


00,No refund records
看起來狀態是 void 已取消

## 122952

TG240205L00095

shopid = 2

1.00

RefundRequest_CreatedDateTime	RefundRequest_UpdatedDateTime
2024-02-05 10:55:20.963	2026-04-15 18:02:08.917

status = s
